assessment: Honest product audit based on code analysis and feature inventory. Weighted average: 6.7/10 (Good Foundation)
methodology: 40% feature completeness, 35% implementation quality, 25% UX polish
key_strengths: Core event creation and RSVP flow is solid
Waitlist system with auto-promotion fully functional
critical_gaps: Analytics dashboard is minimal (only basic RSVP counts)
Team collaboration features missing (no co-hosts or delegated permissions)
Email system incomplete (no reminders, custom templates, follow-ups)
RSVP management lacks depth (no CSV export, promo codes incomplete)
Admin portal is basic (no bulk operations, feature flags, or billing)
notes: Previous scores (9.6+) were inflated self-assessments. Current 6.7 reflects honest production readiness. Platform has solid foundation with clear product roadmap.
